name: 01_terminal_dawn
label: 报错·破晓
prompt: Dark coding terminal screen filling the frame, cascading red error text glowing in darkness. At the bottom, a single line turns gold: 'errcode: 0, ok'. Hands on keyboard visible below. Atmospheric, cinematic. Dunhuang cyberpunk color palette, deep indigo and amber gold. 4K vertical composition.

name: 02_hidden_tag
label: 隐藏标签·顿悟
prompt: Close-up of HTML source code on dark screen. One line glows brilliant gold: 'mp-common-mpaudio voice_encode_fileid'. A single beam of light breaks through darkness onto this line. Around it, other code is dim gray. The feeling of discovery, of a hidden key found. Hard sci-fi meets Chinese ink aesthetic. Square composition.

name: 03_voice_clone
label: 声音克隆·父女
prompt: Two sound waveforms - one large warm amber (father's voice), one smaller delicate gold (daughter's voice) - flowing together into a glowing AI processor orb at center, then emerging as a single unified golden sound wave. Abstract beautiful visualization. Emotional warmth. Dark background with starfield. Vertical 3:4 composition.

name: 04_errors_as_fuel
label: 报错即燃料
prompt: Thirteen red error message fragments floating in dark cosmic space, each one cracking apart and transforming into a golden spark. The sparks converge toward a central glowing star being born. The star's light illuminates everything. Epic scale, cosmic drama. Chinese ink wash meets science fiction. Widescreen landscape composition.
